results.title: 'I was bisexual before marriage': Akanksha Chamola breaks down after sexuality is revealed without her consent
results.description: Akanksha Chamola became emotional on Lock Upp 2 after her bisexuality was disclosed without her consent, prompting her to open up about her past relationships and the emotional impact of being outed on national television.

results.title: 150 people from 50 countries become US citizens at Mount Vernon on America’s 250th birthday
results.description: On the 250th anniversary of American independence, 150 immigrants from 50 countries took the oath of citizenship at George Washington’s Mount Vernon estate. The 150 new citizens represented 50 countries spanning every continent.

results.title: Cabo Verde Say Goodbye to World Cup As the Champions of Hearts
results.description: "I can only thank our team for their effort and for showing so much heart on that pitch, and I think everyone should thank them for what they did for this tournament" Cape Verde head coach Bubista said

results.title: Baby Names Inspired By Lord Vishnu That Symbolise Strength, Protection, Wisdom And Timeless Indian Traditions
results.description: Choosing the right name is a memorable part of welcoming a child. Baby names inspired by Lord Vishnu are admired for their deep spiritual meaning, representing protection, wisdom, compassion and righteousness. These timeless names beautifully combine cultural heritage with values that many parents wish to pass on to the next generation.

results.title: Himachal Monsoon Fury: Flood-like Conditions In Lahaul-Spiti As Roads, Bridges Submerged, Heavy Rain To Continue Till July 12
results.description: Himachal Pradesh is experiencing severe monsoon rains causing widespread flooding submerged roads and bridges especially in Lahaul-Spiti where a new lake formed on the Chandrabhaga River The IMD forecasts continued heavy rainfall until July 12 with 14 fatalities reported so far and significant disruption to daily life and connectivity
